title: austrobuxus clusiaceus
intro: Austrobuxus clusiaceus is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in Australian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Austrobuxus clusiaceus include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. Austrobuxus clusiaceus is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and is used in traditional Australian medicine.
